CE1.justification: Acted directly on the prompt with no clarifying questions; the user was not asked to recall or restate anything.

CE2.justification: Final response is one tight paragraph that names the verdict, the file, and the three blockers with no preamble or trailing summary.

CE3.justification: Names the checklist path and the reason items are MISSING (release notes absent, on-call unconfirmed, comms unknown) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Single artifact (checklist.md with the decision section appended); an interruption would leave one coherent file, no orphans.
